title: addEventListener
description: React to clicks, input, and every DOM event.

questions.prompt: Which is the CORRECT way to listen for a click?
questions.explanation: addEventListener on the target element. The handler receives an event object.
e.target is the element that CAUSED the event — may be a child if the click was inside.

questions.prompt: To stop a form's default submit action:
questions.explanation: preventDefault cancels the default (submit). stopPropagation only stops bubbling.
